reviews.review_msg: Sharam's a good guy but the lectures are only a  little useful but the course is grade 12 physics. Stuff gets repeated often to a point where you question yourself if you have dementia. Exams were suspiciously easy & finished in 30 mins MT1 and 1 hour for finals. Hardest part of the course is having 2 disabled teammates for the project (0 work).
He is not at all helpful. He is not a good professor. I would suggest you not to take his course again
